{{Quote|Stren joined GOSS the year we graduated and, for a Human, proved himself very skilled at aquatic survival. He nearly defeated me in the third Calant Engagement exercise. Nearly.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Akul Witig|<ref name="air" />}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Akul Witig''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who served as a scout and officer in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Witig began his career as a scout student at the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], being a member of the prestigious [[Twilight Class]]. He also noticed [[Stren Grier]], a member of the GOSS staff who joined during his graduation year: Grier almost defeated Witig during a crucial exercise and, due to his Imperial-aligned ideology, Witig considered Grier a threat to the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="air" />

As most of his classmates, Witig joined the Rebel Alliance after graduation.<ref name="air" />

In the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Akul Witig joined the Alliance with the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and was placed in the security force charged with protecting the vital [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] shipyards at [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. An energetic officer, he stopped different schemes of Imperial collaborators, obtaining the respect of his superiors.<ref name="air" />

Akul Witig's performance earned him a place on [[Ma'w'shiye]]'s [[Eclipse Team]] as an aquatic wilderness fighter, and served with the unit on the infamous campaign on [[Karideph]] and other Rebel operations.<ref name="air" />

Witig and his unit fought in the [[Battle of Archais]] against a a faction of Imperial-backed [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild's]] forces and Imperial forces led by lieutenant colonel [[Freja Covell]]. When the Rebel forces were having a hard time, the untimely desertion of Rebel officer [[Mosara Thiirn]] led to an amount of damage and the death of many members of the three Rebel units. Witig's unit only survived thanks to fast thinking of [[Norrion Glidamir]] and [[Shaparo]], but many of his friends died during the battle; due to this, Witig felt a hatred towards Thiirn.<ref name="air" />

Lieutenant Witig was a member of the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]]. As such, he wrote interesting reports about threats to the Rebel Alliance he knew, such as Stren Grier and Moshara Tiirn. He also wrote on Dr. [[Tolum Harous]], explaining that the Alliance had no idea of Harous's beliefs and that they should try to recruit him and put him to work on Dac. Another of Witig's reports covered [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Arcuse]].<ref name="air" />
